description_long: This modern bungalow features a boxy, geometric design with a flat roof and clean lines. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray, with large windows on multiple sides allowing for ample natural light. A spacious deck area with a pool and outdoor seating is visible, along with a staircase leading to an upper level. The property is surrounded by landscaping elements, including trees and shrubs, and is accompanied by a detached garage, a tennis court, and other outdoor amenities. The main building appears to have two stories, with the upper floor set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor living spaces and minimalistic architectural details.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious outdoor deck with a pool, surrounded by landscaped elements and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a tree partially obscuring the lower facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor pool, deck area, and the rear staircase leading to the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full height of the building, the pool, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional landscaping, and the tennis court adjacent to the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
